title: pthread_mutex_t should be unlocked in the reverse order they were locked
description: Mutexes are synchronization primitives that allow the managing of concurrency. It is a common situation to have to use multiple mutexes to protect multiple resources with different access patterns. In such a situation, it is crucial to define an order on the set of all mutexes: This order should be strictly followed when locking mutexes.
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

checks.message: Reverse unlock order violation - mutexes should be unlocked in LIFO order
